zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison於1480年4月9日出生在英國武斯特斯爾德雷頓時，他的父親Thomas Haselwood36歲，母親Christiana Huett33歲。他於大約1501年與Jane Chauntrell在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年7月15日在英國武斯特斯爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 布利德也斯 邱奇 福利特 史崔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison于1480年4月9日出生在英国武斯特斯爾德雷頓时，他的父亲Thomas Haselwood36岁，母亲Christiana Huett33岁。他于大约1501年与Jane Chauntrell在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年7月15日在英国武斯特斯爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 布利德也斯 邱奇 福利特 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Hazelwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hazlewood (Suffolk, Surrey, Devon, Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Shropshire), named with Old English hæsel ‘hazel’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Edmund  , now in quite frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison was born on 9 April 1480, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, his father, Thomas Haselwood, was 36 and his mother, Christiana Huett, was 33. He married Jane Chauntrell about 1501, in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 July 1540, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison est né le 9 avril 1480, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Haselwood, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Christiana Huett, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Jane Chauntrell environ 1501, à Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1540, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Brides, London, England: St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison am 9. April 1480 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Haselwood 36 und seine Mutter Christiana Huett 33. Er hat um 1501 in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Chauntrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1540 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Worcestershire, England und wurde in St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.St. Brides, London, England: St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison è nato il il 9 aprile 1480 nel Drayton, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Haselwood, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Huett, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Jane Chauntrell circa 1501, nel Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1540, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prisonが1480年4月9日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Haselwoodは36歳，母Christiana Huettは33歳であった。約1501年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアメイドウエルでJane Chauntrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年7月15日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト ブリデ'ス チャーチ フリート ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Brides, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 브라이데'스 처르치 플릿 스트릿
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison(이)가 1480년 4월 9일 영국 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Haselwood(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Huett(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 메이드웰에서 Jane Chauntrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 7월 15일 영국 워스스터실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 브라이데'스 처르치 플릿 스트릿에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Brides, London, England: St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison nasceu em 9 de abril de 1480, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Haselwood, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Huett, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Chauntrell aproximadamente 1501, em Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1540, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em St Bride's Church Fleet Street, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Brides, London, England: ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison родился 9 апреля 1480 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Haselwood было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Huett, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Chauntrell около 1501 г. в местности меидвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 июля 1540 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
